channel.title: Use Case Intel — Threat Intel Feed
channel.description: High-fidelity IOCs aggregated from The Hacker News, BleepingComputer, Microsoft Security Blog and CISA KEV. Refreshed daily. CVEs/hashes via regex; domains/IPs only when defanged by the source author.

item.title: [CVE/HIGH] CVE-2026-32202
item.description:
CVE: CVE-2026-32202

Severity: high · First seen: 2026-04-28 · Sources: The Hacker News

Context: Microsoft Confirms Active Exploitation of Windows Shell CVE-2026-32202

item.title: [CVE/HIGH] CVE-2026-25874
item.description:
CVE: CVE-2026-25874

Severity: high · First seen: 2026-04-28 · Sources: The Hacker News

Context: Critical Unpatched Flaw Leaves Hugging Face LeRobot Open to Unauthenticated RCE
